{{Quote|No offense, ''jetii'', but kneecapping your brother made my day, it surely did.|Carid, talking to [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]]|<ref name="Legacy of the Force: Revelation">''[[Legacy of the Force: Revelation]]''</ref>}}
'''Baltan Carid''', in [[Mando'a/Legends|Mando'a]] '''Car'ika'''<ref name="Legacy of the Force: Revelation" /> was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] warrior during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. He had a dark blue [[Tattoo/Legends|tattoo]] of a vine starting somewhere below his armor line and ending right under his chin. His hair was white by then, with no hint to what its former color might have been. He was a brusquely cheerful man, and very loud. He usually fought without his helmet, and often forgot that he didn't need to shout to be heard over the helmet comlink on the rare occasions when he did wear one. He often made jokes and seemed in almost constant good humor. He wore bright violet ''Mando'' armor

[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] had last seen Carid slaying [[Yuuzhan Vong]] with an 'Imperial-era blaster' at the fight on [[Caluula Station]] before a meeting he held on [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]] about the state of the Mandalorian people.

Carid would later participate in the [[Second Battle of Fondor]], helping Fett take down [[Moff/Legends|Imperial Moffs]] aboard the [[Turbulent-class Star Destroyer|''Turbulent''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Bloodfin (Star Destroyer)|''Bloodfin'']]. Carid along with Fett and [[Novoc Vevut]] took down all the [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] guarding the Moffs before [[Death/Legends|killing]] the Moffs themselves. Carid and Vevut chased [[Sith apprentice/Legends|Sith apprentice]] [[Tahiri Veila]] into an airlock docking tube, and Carid shot [[Darth Caedus]]' knee instead of killing him outright, as Fett wanted to leave Caedus for his sister, [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]], to fight another time.
